metadata.description: Resource name for the policy assignment (no spaces).

assignmentDisplayName.defaultValue: Enable allLogs diagnostic settings to regional storage accounts

metadata.description: Display name shown in the Azure portal.

Map of Azure region name to storage account resource ID. Storage accounts must be in the same region as the resources they collect logs from. Example: {"eastus": "/subscriptions/.../storageAccounts/stdiageastus"}
Enable or disable the execution of the policy.
Name of the diagnostic setting resource created on each compliant resource.
Resource types to enforce. Leave empty to use the initiative default (all supported types).
Only apply to resources matching ALL of these tags. Leave empty to apply to all resources.
Skip resources matching ALL of these tags. Leave empty to exclude no resources.

Map of Azure region name to storage account resource ID. Example: {"eastus": "/subscriptions/00000000-0000-0000-0000-000000000000/resourceGroups/rg-diag/providers/Microsoft.Storage/storageAccounts/stdiageastus", "westeurope": "/subscriptions/..."}
Name of the diagnostic setting created and managed by this policy.
Map of tag name to tag value. Only resources matching ALL specified tags will have diagnostic settings deployed. Leave empty to apply to all resources.
Map of tag name to tag value. Resources matching ALL specified tags will be excluded from diagnostic settings deployment. Leave empty to exclude no resources.
Log category groups to enable. 'allLogs' captures every available category; 'audit' captures audit events only. Specify one or both.

properties.displayName: Apply Diagnostic Settings for microsoft.aad/domainservices to a Regional Storage Account
properties.description: Deploys diagnostic settings for microsoft.aad/domainservices to the storage account mapped to each resource's Azure region. Resources in regions not present in storageAccountsByRegion are skipped.

properties.displayName: Enable allLogs category group resource logging for supported resources to regional storage accounts
properties.description: Resource logs should be enabled to track activities and events that take place on your resources and give you visibility and insights into any changes that occur. This initiative deploys diagnostic settings using the allLogs category group to route logs to the storage account mapped to each resource's Azure region.

metadata.description: Enable or disable the execution of the policy
Name of the diagnostic setting created and managed by this initiative.
Map of Azure region name to storage account resource ID. Storage accounts must be in the same region as the resources they collect logs from.
List of resource types to enforce. Remove a type to disable enforcement for that resource type.
Map of tag name to tag value. Only resources matching ALL specified tags will have diagnostic settings deployed. Leave empty to apply to all resources.
Map of tag name to tag value. Resources matching ALL specified tags will be excluded from diagnostic settings deployment. Leave empty to exclude no resources.
'allLogs' captures every available category; 'audit' captures audit events only. Specify one or both.
Resource name for the policy assignment (no spaces).

assignmentDisplayName.defaultValue: Enable allLogs diagnostic settings to regional storage accounts

metadata.description: Display name shown in the Azure portal.

Map of Azure region name to storage account resource ID. Storage accounts must be in the same region as the resources they collect logs from. Example: {"eastus": "/subscriptions/.../storageAccounts/stdiageastus"}
Enable or disable the execution of the policy.
Name of the diagnostic setting resource created on each compliant resource.
Resource types to enforce. Leave empty to use the initiative default (all supported types).
Only apply to resources matching ALL of these tags. Leave empty to apply to all resources.
Skip resources matching ALL of these tags. Leave empty to exclude no resources.

properties.displayName: [parameters('assignmentDisplayName')]
